title: Autumn Wild-Flowers
content:
Like colored lanterns swung in Elfin towers,
    Wild morning-glories light the tangled ways,
    And, like the rosy rockets of the Fays,
    Burns the sloped crimson of the cardinal-flowers.
meaning:
Madison Julius Cawein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Autumn Wild-Flowers"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
